jobDescription: We are launching a new role for a Marketing Coordinator within our Seller Product Marketing team. As the Marketing Coordinator, you will help increase the efficiency of the product the marketing team’s campaigns and content, as well as support marketing initiatives that drive seller success across all verticals. This role will report to the Product Marketing Manager and works in close collaboration with the broader seller partner team, product, marketing, and editorial to develop and execute campaigns. We have a startup culture that is constantly evolving, so comfort with ambiguity is very important. In exchange, you’ll be given the opportunity to work with and learn from some of the most passionate, driven and creative people assembled under one roof. What you’ll do Maintain report outs on performance and effectiveness of campaigns across all seller channels and make content recommendations based on past performance Manage and regularly update seller educational content across channels Ensure strong value-based messaging, brand consistency and core values across all campaign communications Assist in coordination of seller education initiatives such as in-person seminars and online webinar production Support various direct mail projects in coordination with partner managers to increase seller satisfaction What you’ll bring If you join us, you’ll come on board with a passion for marketing and:0-2 years of digital marketing experience Strong written, and verbal communication skills The ability to juggle multiple projects with ease and to prioritize effectively Strong project management and documentation skills Proficiency with Excel and Google Docs Strong attention to detail A love for design and eagerness to learn Bachelor’s Degree Experience and/or understanding of a marketplace/e-commerce platform is a plus
